nasb.text: Then the angel of the Lord stood in a narrow path of the vineyards, with a wall on this side and a wall on that side.

esv.text: Then the angel of the Lord stood in a narrow path between the vineyards, with a wall on either side.

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者站在葡萄園間的窄路上，兩邊都有圍牆。

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使又站在葡萄园之间的一条窄路上，两边都是墙。
